expectations.text: Asks 2-3 scoping questions before producing the hierarchy
expectations.evidence: Asks exactly 3 questions before writing anything.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the specific target audience
expectations.evidence: Q1 asks who exactly the primary audience is, with concrete examples.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the key differentiator or the main alternative/competitor
expectations.evidence: Q2 targets the single differentiator; Q3 targets the real competing alternative.

expectations.text: Does NOT output a full messaging hierarchy built on guessed inputs in this turn
expectations.evidence: No hierarchy produced; only questions plus an offer to proceed on assumptions if asked.

expectations.text: Questions are concise (not an open-ended interrogation of many items)
expectations.evidence: Three sharp questions, not a long checklist.
